positive: A minimalist and whimsical illustration of a floating group of celestial spheres and constellations, forming a magical dreamscape. The central subject is a stylized crescent moon cradling a cluster of glowing, abstract nebulas and eight distinct, friendly-looking planets arranged in a cohesive, balanced composition. The style should be modern flat design mixed with fine line botanical illustration elements, using a restricted color palette of deep indigo, ethereal gold, soft teal, and creamy white. High contrast silhouette against a very subtle gradient sky. Vector artwork, perfect for apparel printing, central composition, clean lines, clean silhouette, high detail, magical realism.
